# Extracao: Module 4

- **Fonte:** Module 4.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

﻿MODULE 4 PRELAUNCH CONTENT

Welcome to Module 4 of Product Launch Formula, which is all about the Prelaunch. Your Prelaunch Content ("PLC"), when done right, helps your potential buyers understand the Opportunity, the Transformation, and the Ownership Experience promised by your product. By the end of this module, you’ll know how create each of these pieces of content, how to get people onto your launch list, and what to mail during your Prelaunch.

1 Introduction [2 minutes]
This lesson will introduce you to Prelaunch Content and how to create it.

2 The Prelaunch Sequence [5 minutes]
This lesson is about the Prelaunch Sequence. This combination of content and email guides prospects through your Sideways Sales Letter in a way that leaves them ready to buy your product when you Open Cart.

3 Prelaunch Content 1: The Opportunity [15 minutes]
PLC 1 is about the “why” - why should your prospect care? You need to show people why your product is a necessary solution to whatever pain they're currently experiencing. This lesson shows how to structure and deliver your first piece of Prelaunch Content and includes a step-by-step planner.

4 Prelaunch Content 2: The Transformation [14 minutes]
PLC 2 is about the “what” – what is the transformation that you are promising? This lesson is a walkthrough of how to structure and deliver your second piece of Prelaunch Content and includes a step-by-step planner with a checklist to keep you on track.

5 Prelaunch Content 3: The Ownership Experience [14 minutes]
PLC 3 is about the "how" - how is your product or service going to change your prospects’ lives? This lesson will show you how to structure and deliver your third piece of Prelaunch Content and includes a step-by-step planner.

6 Scripting Your Prelaunch Content [7 minutes]
Your Prelaunch is a story that ties together the three pieces of Prelaunch Content (the opportunity, the transformation, and the ownership experience). In this lesson you'll learn how to script your PLCs and be given a skeleton script you can download and use when writing your own scripts.

7 Prelaunch Content Walkthroughs [2 hours 44 minutes]
In these case studies, Jeff walks through real-life examples of PLCs created by PLF Owners. I’ll also point out the mental triggers we talked about back in the first module. And because it’s important to remember that not every video will be perfect of fantastic or awesome (and that’s ok) I’ll also be pointing out the good and the bad as I go through these videos.

Nicholas Wilton: Here I walk you step-by-step through the PLC transcripts for Nicholas Wilton’s Launch for his Art2Life course and break it all down for you into the critical components.

Susan Garrett: This is a walkthrough of a super-successful launch by Susan Garrett for one of her dog agility products. She’s in my Platinum Plus mastermind group, and she’s had incredible success, but she came into Product Launch Formula as a COMPLETE newbie with no list and almost no technical skills.

Will Hamilton: This is a walkthrough of an excellent launch by Will Hamilton that did over six figures in sales in a niche market – and these Prelaunch videos are a fantastic example of how to do it right. Please don’t be intimidated by the quality of this launch – it was NOT Will’s first launch. The thing to remember is that he was truly struggling when he first joined PLF.

8 Types of Prelaunch Content [8 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about the different types and formats you can use for your Prelaunch Content.

9 Creating Prelaunch Videos [36 minutes]
In this lesson, you'll learn how to create Prelaunch Content when using videos to deliver your PLC.

10 Creating Other Types of Prelaunch Content [8 minutes]
You don't have to do video for your Prelaunch Content! There are other types of Prelaunch Content that you may want to consider, like webinars or emails. This lesson covers those types of content and what you need to know before trying them.

11 Building Your Launch List [13 minutes]
Your launch list is the email list you build for and during a launch. The prospects on your launch list will receive your entire PLC and Open Cart Sequence. In this lesson you'll learn how to build that launch list.

12 Mailing Your Launch List [20 minutes]
Having a well-planned email sequence and strategy is one of the most important aspects to an effective launch. This lesson covers some of the key strategies to use during the Prelaunch.

13 Launch Metrics [14 minutes]
This lesson is about your launch metrics, or the numbers you need to know and track. When you understand what to track and how it affects sales and conversion rates, you’ll be able to tweak your launch for better results.

14 Building your list during launch [19 minutes]
In this Bonus, you’ll get a step-by-step walkthrough of how to build a list during your launch using Facebook ads as we walk you through our own Facebook ads strategy.
